Intramural Research Program YouTube: NIH Intramural Research Program Office of Extramural Research X: @NIHFunding LinkedIn: NIH Funding YouTube: NIH Funding NIH Comment Guidelines The NIH comment guidelines are designed to encourage respectful and constructive dialogue. We ask that your comments be respectful and relevant to the specific topic. In submitting comments to an NIH website, you irrevocably grant NIH permission to copy, distribute, make derivatives, display, or perform your work publicly and free-of-charge. Get more information on the NIH Comment Guidelines . This page last reviewed on March 19, 2026
